data.title: Sranan Gold Extends Randy’s Pit Mineralization Along Poeketi Shear Zone
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Peak Minerals Ltd. ( (TSE:SRAN) ).

Sranan Gold Corp. has extended gold mineralization at the Randy’s Pit Zone by 200 metres to the northwest along the Poeketi Shear Zone, with new drilling tracing mineralization over an 800-metre strike that remains open in all directions. Recent holes include a standout intercept of 20 metres grading 1.33 g/t gold, reinforcing the continuity and potential scale of the system.

The 2026 step-out drilling confirms that the regional shear zone can host gold along much of its five-kilometre length between Randy’s Pit and the Poeketi Zone, underpinning a broader exploration thesis for multiple sub-parallel zones. These results strengthen Sranan’s geological model and could enhance the project’s strategic value by supporting the case for a larger, continuous gold-bearing structure that warrants further drilling and investment.

Spark’s Take on SRAN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRAN is a Neutral.

TSE:SRAN’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges with no revenue and consistent losses. While technical analysis shows some positive signals, and recent corporate events suggest strategic initiatives, these factors are insufficient to overcome the financial difficulties and lack of valuation metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on SRAN stock, click here.

More about Peak Minerals Ltd.

Sranan Gold Corp. is a gold exploration company focused on developing projects along the Poeketi Shear Zone in Suriname. The company targets structurally controlled gold mineralization, advancing its Randy’s Pit and Poeketi zones where artisanal mining activity indicates significant exploration potential.

Average Trading Volume: 224,018

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$12.52M

data.title: Emma Villas Finalizes Merger of Subsidiary Marche Holiday Villas
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Emma Villas S.P.A. ( (IT:EAV) ) is now available.

Emma Villas has executed the deed of merger to incorporate its wholly owned subsidiary Marche Holiday Villas S.r.l., completing a key step in a broader reorganization of the group. The merger, which was previously approved by the boards and shareholders, is designed to simplify governance and strengthen operational, administrative, and management synergies within the group.

Under Italian civil law, the merger will take effect once all required registrations are completed, while its accounting and tax effects are retroactively applied from 1 January 2026. By consolidating its structure, Emma Villas aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency, a move that may enhance its competitive positioning in the Italian vacation rental sector and provide clearer oversight for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:EAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Emma Villas S.P.A. stock, see the IT:EAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Emma Villas S.P.A.

Emma Villas S.p.A. is a leading Italian operator in the vacation rental market, specializing in short-term rentals of villas and prestigious residences and listed on Euronext Growth Milan. The company manages a portfolio of more than 600 high-end properties across Italy and hosts over 55,000 guests annually, offering owners guaranteed income, property management services, and insurance coverage for accidental damage.

Average Trading Volume: 6,207

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €9.34M

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

An announcement from GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) is now available.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited has continued to execute its share buyback programme, repurchasing 535,856 ordinary shares on 25 March 2026 at a volume-weighted average price of 73.91 pence. The shares, bought through RBC Europe Limited across multiple trading venues, are being held in treasury as part of the company’s ongoing capital management strategy.

Following the latest transaction, GCP Infra has 884,797,669 ordinary shares in issue, of which 57,076,840 are held in treasury, leaving 827,720,829 voting shares outstanding. Since the buyback programme began in December 2024, the company has acquired a total of 40,091,821 shares for treasury, a move that may enhance net asset value per share and reflects management’s efforts to optimise the capital structure for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GCP) stock is a Buy with a £90.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP stock, see the GB:GCP Stock Forecast page.

The score is primarily driven by strong balance-sheet conservatism and improving cash generation, supported by constructive technical trend signals. Offsetting these positives are inconsistent/declining revenue trends and a demanding P/E despite an attractive dividend yield, with corporate actions (dividend stability and buybacks) providing additional support.

data.title: Shell Continues Share Buyback Programme With March 25 Share Repurchases
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Shell (UK) ( (GB:SHEL) ).

Shell plc has repurchased a total of 1,089,316 of its own shares on 25 March 2026 across multiple venues in London and continental Europe, with trades executed in both GBP and EUR. The purchases, which will be cancelled, were carried out on the London Stock Exchange, Chi-X, BATS, Euronext Amsterdam, CBOE DXE, and Turquoise.

These buybacks form part of Shell’s previously announced on- and off-market share repurchase programme running from early February to 1 May 2026, with Morgan Stanley & Co. International Plc making trading decisions independently of the company. The programme is being executed under Shell’s existing shareholder authorities and within detailed UK and EU market abuse and buy-back regulations, underscoring a continued focus on capital returns and regulatory compliance.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SHEL) stock is a Buy with a £3841.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shell (UK) stock, see the GB:SHEL Stock Forecast page.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial profitability/cash generation tempered by softer recent free-cash-flow trajectory and rising leverage. Supportive earnings-call guidance (cost reductions, disciplined CapEx, strong shareholder returns) and constructive technical trend add confidence, while valuation (moderate P/E and ~3.9% yield) is an additional positive.

The latest announcement is out from Puma VCT 13 PLC ( (GB:PU13) ).

Puma VCT 13 plc has increased the size of its current fund-raising offer after strong investor demand for its new ordinary shares. The company originally sought to raise up to £50 million with an additional £20 million over-allotment facility and has now exercised that facility in full.

As a result, the maximum amount the trust can raise under the ongoing offer has risen to £70 million, expanding its capacity to deploy capital into qualifying venture investments. This enlarged raise underscores robust investor appetite for venture capital trust products and may enhance Puma VCT 13’s ability to scale its investment activities and broaden its portfolio of growth companies.

More about Puma VCT 13 PLC

Puma VCT 13 plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust that raises funds from investors to back a diversified portfolio of smaller, high-growth companies. It offers ordinary shares to investors seeking exposure to venture capital opportunities alongside associated tax-efficient investment structures in the UK market.

data.title: Nevada Organic Phosphate Touts Murdock Mountain as Fertilizer Supply Crunch Deepens
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Silver Eagle Mines Inc. ( (TSE:NOP) ) is now available.

Nevada Organic Phosphate is highlighting the strategic value of its Murdock Mountain direct-application rock phosphate project as geopolitical turmoil in the Middle East disrupts global fertilizer supply chains. With much of the world’s nitrogen fertilizer, sulfur, and urea flows impeded by attacks on energy infrastructure and a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, conventional sulfur- and ammonia-intensive phosphate producers are facing higher costs and constrained output.

By contrast, NOP’s U.S.-based project does not rely on sulfur, ammonia, or high-energy chemical processing and is insulated from maritime chokepoints, giving it potential appeal as a stable, low-energy nutrient source for organic and regenerative farming systems. The company’s positioning underscores how domestic, policy-independent phosphate resources could gain prominence as fertilizer markets undergo one of their most severe supply shocks in decades, with implications for farmers, input costs, and food security.

More about Silver Eagle Mines Inc.

Nevada Organic Phosphate Inc. is a junior exploration company focused on organic sedimentary raw rock phosphate in northeast Nevada, where it controls a 6.6-kilometre phosphate bed with applications that could extend the strike length to more than 30 kilometres. The project, believed to be the only large-scale organic sedimentary phosphate deposit in North America, is located near major highway and rail links serving Nevada and California, positioning it to supply fertilizer markets in the western United States.

Average Trading Volume: 713,196

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$17.06M

Learn more about NOP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: INWIT Calls Remote Shareholders’ Meeting to Approve 2025 Results and Share Cancellation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Inwit ( (IT:INW) ) has shared an announcement.

INWIT’s Board of Directors has convened a shareholders’ meeting for 30 April 2026, to be held exclusively via remote communication with participation through a designated representative. On the agenda in ordinary session are approval of the 2025 financial statements and profit allocation, a vote on the 2026 remuneration policy and 2025 compensation report, adoption of a long-term share-based incentive plan for 2026–2030, and the appointment of one director.

In extraordinary session, shareholders will be asked to approve the cancellation of 27,895,167 treasury shares previously repurchased, without reducing share capital, which may improve capital efficiency and share metrics. The Board will separately approve 2025 results on 2 April 2026 and has confirmed that all directors meet integrity requirements, with most meeting independence standards, reinforcing the company’s governance framework ahead of the meeting.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:INW) stock is a Hold with a EUR10.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inwit stock, see the IT:INW Stock Forecast page.

More about Inwit

Infrastrutture Wireless Italiane S.p.A. (INWIT) is an Italian operator in the wireless infrastructure sector, managing telecommunications towers and related assets. The company provides passive infrastructure services to mobile network operators and other connectivity providers, supporting mobile coverage and network deployment across Italy.

Average Trading Volume: 4,823,632

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: €5.67B
